architecture.summary: Existing hybrid search: KV edge + Postgres. Optimization is edge-first with conditional Postgres fallback. No new services or architectural changes -- just reordering existing calls and adding conditional logic.

integrations.summary: No new integrations. Existing: Cloudflare KV (edge search index), Neon Postgres (authoritative search), Cloudflare CDN (cache headers). All stay the same.

security.summary: No security changes. Search is public read-only API. Existing input sanitization (XSS via sanitizeHighlight, query length validation) unchanged. CDN cache is public content only.

ui-ux.summary: Preload 10 trending skills from existing KV stats on palette open. Client-side filter treats preloaded results identically to search results (no special indicator). 2min stale window acceptable, no cache bust needed.

performance.summary: Target p95 < 200ms. Add Server-Timing header for edge vs postgres latency measurement. Edge-first skips Postgres when sufficient results. CDN s-maxage=60 with stale-while-revalidate=300. SWR cache 60s.

edge-cases.summary: Client-side highlighting acceptable for edge-only results. Edge fallback to Postgres on insufficient results. Blocklist enrichment conditional on source. Graceful degradation if KV or Postgres fails.
